| The White House • February 27, 2019
---
| | |
# **An inside look at President Trump’s Hanoi summit**

**Twelve hours ahead** of Eastern Standard Time in Hanoi, Vietnam, President Donald J. Trump is preparing now for his second day of talks with Chairman Kim Jong Un. The President’s first full day in Hanoi included both a one-on-one conversation and dinner with the North Korean leader.

**“I think that your country** has tremendous economic potential,” President Trump told Chairman Kim. If North Korea continues to choose engagement with the United States and honors its commitments to denuclearize, the future for its people can be bright. “I look forward to watching it happen,” President Trump said. “And we will help it to happen.”
* Watch President Trump [greet Chairman Kim](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0483b42420&e=3ee4985eea) in Hanoi

* President Trump: “I think the [biggest progress](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b36955d40a&e=3ee4985eea) was our relationship”

* Photos from [the President’s dinner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e342946c64&e=3ee4985eea) with Chairman Kim

**Earlier in the day,** President Trump met with President Nguyen Phu Trong of Vietnam—and delivered on another crucial promise to American voters.

**More than 83,000 American jobs** will be supported by new commercial trade deals between Vietnamese airlines and American companies. President Trump, alongside President Trong, participated in the signing of a plan this morning that agrees to the purchase of new planes, engines, and services from U.S. manufacturers. The agreements are worth more than $21 billion in sum.

**“We appreciate very much** that you’re reducing the trade deficit with the United States, which was very substantial before I got here,” President Trump told Vietnamese Prime Minister Nguyen Xuan Phuc. “And now we’re bringing it down with great orders like the orders that you made today.”
* By the numbers: America’s [new commercial trade deal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cc3090a1ba&e=3ee4985eea) with Vietnam

* Watch [highlights of the President meeting](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42f80f8180&e=3ee4985eea) with Vietnam’s leaders

* Follow [President Trump’s trip to Vietnam](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29ec10bd1d&e=3ee4985eea) in photos

---
|
---
|
## **What Nicolas Maduro doesn’t want you to see**

**Univision anchor Jorge Ramos,** an American citizen, and five members of his team were detained and later released in Venezuela on Monday by Nicolas Maduro. The reason? Maduro “didn’t like the questions” he was being asked, Univision reports.

**What didn't Maduro** want the world to see when he detained these journalists and seized Ramos’ equipment? The answer is that while Venezuelans starve and are forced to scavenge in garbage trucks for food, Maduro's thugs are setting fire to aid supplies.

**The walls are closing** in on the dictatorship in Caracas.

[Read the full story.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e139d0ae26&e=3ee4985eea)

**In photos:**[Vice President Mike Pence meets Venezuelans in Colombia on Monday.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c6db4a20e3&e=3ee4985eea)

body:
Should the Mueller Report be Released to the Public? No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-g/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-y/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-j/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-t/)
### [Should the Mueller Report be Released to the Public?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-i/)
Whenever Robert Mueller finishes up his Russian collusion investigation (likely to be this week or next), he will submit his confidential report to our new Attorney General, William Barr. Then Barr will have a decision to make. How much of the report does he release to Congress and how much does he release to the public?

Click the link below to read more and hear my thoughts. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-d/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [An Evening With Ulysses S. Grant](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-u/)
I considered writing this week's blog about President Trump's declaration of a national emergency, or which Democrat jumped into the presidential race most recently, or AOC's latest crackpot proposal, but decided instead to write about Ulysses S. Grant. Yes, Ulysses S. Grant.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [So Just How Radical Is This New Democratic Party?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-p/)
Pretty darn radical. John F. Kennedy sure wouldn't recognize it. He believed instinctively in a strong America. In lower taxes to spur economic growth. In a robust foreign policy, and an adequate military to support it. In less government, not more. Remember "ask not what your country can do for you, ask what you can do for your country?" [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-x/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-c/)
### [Are We Headed for Another Shutdown?](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jtkrtktd-kujkulhluu-q/)
Well the longest government shutdown in U.S. history is finally over. Of course we could be right back in the middle of another one in less than three weeks. So what's going to happen? _At the Story County Democrats “Soup Supper” on February 23._
Peter,
I want to take a moment to thank those of you that have sent such kind words of advice and encouragement as I consider my options for 2020. I’ve been busy this year welcoming 2020 presidential candidates to Iowa while working as state director for Working Hero Action, an organization fighting to end poverty and bring awareness to the Earned Income Tax Credit. You can learn more about our efforts in Iowa here: **[https://workingheroaction.org/iowa](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5097889/43235386/2147340379?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2EzMThlMC03YTNiLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dxWY1P-tOFmLVeL_lZR31FJSEFqKus424hNNRWfraCI=)**.
Recently, we’ve held events with **[Sherrod Brown in Mason City](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5097891/43235388/-1477438784?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2EzMThlMC03YTNiLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dxWY1P-tOFmLVeL_lZR31FJSEFqKus424hNNRWfraCI=&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter&utm_campaign=user-share)** , with **[Eric Swalwell in Iowa City](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5097892/43235390/141235725?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2EzMThlMC03YTNiLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dxWY1P-tOFmLVeL_lZR31FJSEFqKus424hNNRWfraCI=)** , and with **[John Delaney in Marshalltown](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5097893/43235391/1261371566?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2EzMThlMC03YTNiLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dxWY1P-tOFmLVeL_lZR31FJSEFqKus424hNNRWfraCI=)**. The next Working Hero Action event will be **[Marianne Williamson in Carroll on Fri, March 1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5097894/43235392/1803750723?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2EzMThlMC03YTNiLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dxWY1P-tOFmLVeL_lZR31FJSEFqKus424hNNRWfraCI=)**.
**In 4th District news** , Steve King is still out of touch and spends more time creating controversy then he does seeking solutions.
His recent interview from _Iowa Press_ : **[http://www.iptv.org/iowapress/story/33127/representative-steve-king](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5097895/43235393/-663384680?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2EzMThlMC03YTNiLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dxWY1P-tOFmLVeL_lZR31FJSEFqKus424hNNRWfraCI=)**

And finally, in case you hadn’t heard...
**Steve King is in JEOPARDY. **
Steve King kicked off 2019 by being stripped of his congressional committee assignments after his remarks supporting white supremacy. And now **an EXCLUSIVE poll from _The Majority Rules_ shows Rep. Steve King LOSING to a Democratic challenger by nearly 10 points!** **[https://action.themajorityrules.org/page/s/king-poll](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5097897/43235395/1319280075?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2EzMThlMC03YTNiLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dxWY1P-tOFmLVeL_lZR31FJSEFqKus424hNNRWfraCI=)**.
More on the poll and the 2020 race in the 4th CD can be found here: **[IA-04 POLL: STEVE KING’S SUPPORT SINKING BACK HOME, DEM LEADS MATCHUP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/5097898/43235396/-2126919609?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzM2EzMThlMC03YTNiLWU5MTEtYjhiMy0yODE4NzgzOTFlZmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dxWY1P-tOFmLVeL_lZR31FJSEFqKus424hNNRWfraCI=)**
The next two years promise to be an exciting time for this district and for America, and whatever our future holds, I’ll be standing with you.

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: A sickness is spreading and it must be stopped
body:
| | Peter, I’m appalled. The Senate voted in favor of murdering freshly born babies. The Born Alive Abortion Survivors Protection Act, reintroduced to the Senate on Monday, failed by a vote of 53 to 44. The Senate could not even come close to agreeing that born-alive babies do not deserve execution. In fact, all of the prominent Democratic 2020 Presidential hopefuls joined forces to block the act. **If I were taking our nation’s temperature, the thermometer would show that the fever just spiked. America is severely ill.** If we cannot protect babies with a law prohibiting the onslaught of infanticide, then we will be on the wrong side of history and it’s only a matter of time before our society slides into an irrepressible decline. It’s clear, our moral compass as a nation is severely damaged. It’s bad enough that states like Vermont and Illinois are following the lead of New York by introducing bills that would permit abortion up until birth, and now we are killing babies OUTSIDE the womb. **The _only_ remedy for our nation is for Christians to boldly rise up and take action.** There is a movement in our country that is spreading like cancer and it seeks to destroy biblical values. This is why we MUST mobilize 90-million Christians _now_ to stand for life! We cannot wait. **[Our team at My Faith Votes has put together a three-part plan that’s going into effect now, but we need your donations to make it possible](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190228apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190228apl01nd&n=1).**
* We’re leveraging leading Christian voices to create compelling videos for social media platforms and TV public service announcements to reach unengaged Christians to stand for life.
* We’re organizing communication between Christians and their elected officials to keep the pressure on. They need to feel the power of 90-million Christians holding them accountable.
* Lastly, My Faith Votes is working directly with the new pro-life film, Unplanned, releasing on March 29 to ensure every person who sees the movie has the ability to connect, engage and start taking action for life.

We must continue to oppose the evil that values the convenience of choice over the sanctity of life. Will you please stand with us now to defend life? The abortion movement is so intense it’s gaining traction every single day, and it must be stopped. Please make your best donation today to help us treat our nation’s greatest sickness and advocate for life! [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190228apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190228apl01nd&n=2) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190228apl01nd&n=3)
---
* * *

10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190228apl01nd&n=5) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190228apl01nd&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190228apl01nd&n=7)

GREG PENCE VICTORY is a joint fundraising committee composed of GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, MUSTANG PAC, GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE, and the NRCC.
Any contribution to GREG PENCE VICTORY permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended, from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable contribution limits will be allocated among the participating committees as follows:
a. The first $5,400 from an individual shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the Primary and General Election. The second $5,000 from an individual shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $5,000 shall go to the GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $33,900 shall go to the NRCC.
b. The first $10,800 of a joint contribution shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the Primary and General Election. The second $10,000 of a joint contribution shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $10,000 shall go to GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to$67,800 shall go to the NRCC.
c. The first $5,400 from a federal non-multicandidate committee shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the Primary and General Election. The second $5,000 from a federal non-multicandidate committee shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $5,000 shall go to the GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $33,900 shall go to the NRCC.
d. The first $10,000 from a federal multicandidate committee shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the Primary and General Election. The second $5,000 shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $5,000 shall go to the GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $15,000 shall go to the NRCC.
The contributor’s signature designates his or her contribution as described above. Contributions that exceed a contributor’s contribution limit to a participating committee shall be reallocated to the remaining participating committees according to this allocation formula and as permitted by law.
The legal maximum that an individual and non-multicandidate political action committee may contribute to GREG PENCE VICTORY in a calendar year is $49,300 subject to the increase for inflation in odd-numbered years. The legal maximum amount couples may contribute is $98,600 if each spouse so designates the contributions, subject to the increase for inflation in odd-numbered years. The legal maximum that a multicandidate political action committee may contribute to GREG PENCE VICTORY is $35,000 in a calendar year. Notwithstanding the allocation formula described above, contributions may be designated by the contributor for a specific committee, to the extent permitted by law.
The maximum an individual may contribute to a federal candidate is $2,800 per election subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years; $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee; and $33,900 per calendar year to a national party committee subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years. Qualified multicandidate PACs may contribute $5,000 per election to a federal candidate, $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee, and $15,000 per calendar year to a national party committee. Non-multicandidate PACs may contribute $2,700 per election to a federal candidate, $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee and $33,900 per calendar year to a national party committee, subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years. All funds received in response to this solicitation will be subject to federal contribution limits and prohibitions. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without “green cards,” and federal government contractors are prohibited.
Contributions to GREG PENCE VICTORY, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

Non-multicandidate PACs may contribute $2,700 per election to a federal candidate, $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee and $33,900 per calendar year to a national party committee, subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years. All funds received in response to this solicitation will be subject to federal contribution limits and prohibitions. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without “green cards,” and federal government contractors are prohibited. Contributions to GREG PENCE VICTORY, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

| Derek, It has been a busy first month for me here at the New Hampshire Republican Party, and we're holding our federal delegation accountable for their inactions and silence while simultaneously getting things geared up to take back our majorities in New Hampshire. In the last 30 days, I have expanded NHGOP fundraising, met with our allies in Washington, and the party has increased its footprint, all helping us to build an unprecedented grassroots operation for 2020. I've also put together a business plan to take back the New Hampshire House, Senate, Executive Council and a roadmap for replacing our two members of Congress and retiring Senator Jeanne Shaheen in 2020. The party has also called out the Democrats for proposing bad legislation in the Granite State, like their attempts to implement an income tax, a capital gains tax, and their continued assaults on the Second Amendment. Meanwhile, as New Hampshire Democrats are waging a war on _Live Free or Die_ , our federal delegation can't be bothered to comment on national scandals from their Democrat colleagues.

| | Hey Peter,

I wanted to quickly introduce myself to you and follow up on the email you received from our team yesterday, asking you to help Abigail Spanberger's campaign reach its critical end-of-month fundraising goal.

My name is Whitney Holt, and I've recently taken over as finance director for Abigail's campaign. It's great to meet you! I'm really excited to be on the team, and to help make sure that Abigail has the resources she needs to win and keep fighting for central Virginia's working families in Congress.

But like I said, I'm also reaching out to follow up on our campaign's email to you yesterday.

We're so happy to say that the response was incredible, and now we're so close to reaching our goal for February. Your grassroots support is so important to our campaign, Peter. It's the reason that Abigail was able to run such a strong campaign focused on real kitchen table issues in 2018. I know that she truly appreciates the support of folks like you, chipping in $5 or $10 at a time.

But this next election is going to be even harder for Abigail than the last one. **The National Republican Campaign Committee has already announced that our toss-up district is one of their TOP targets for this election.** The only way that we'll be in a good position to fight back against their attacks is if we have the resources to compete on voters' TVs, at voters' doors, and on voters' phones.

I want you to know that amongst the ongoing chaos in Washington...there is some actual work getting done. Here's some highlights from just this past month:
Tom O'Halleran is running for Congress in Arizona's 1st district, a critical race to getting Congress back on track. Click here to donate to Tom's campaign and help him put Arizona families first.
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d6323dc/1a8421e1/1982c9b70/5a920280/2695616559/VEsH/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq12019?refcode=em_header&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

Tom

subject: Rep. Adam Kinzinger's Report from the Border: More Drugs, More Human Trafficking
body:
"Rep. Adam Kinzinger, R-Ill., has been deployed to the southern border as a member of the Air National Guard four times now..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bf84287c2f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Rep. Adam Kinzinger's****R****eport****from the****B****order****: More****D****rugs,****M****ore****H****uman****T****rafficking**

“Rep. Adam Kinzinger, R-Ill., has been deployed to the southern border as a member of the Air National Guard four times now, and says he's never seen more drug smuggling and human trafficking than he did on his most recent deployment this month,” Anna Giaritelli writes.

“Before going on my recent border mission with the Air National Guard, I was neutral on the need for a declaration of national emergency,” Rep. Kinzinger wrote on Facebook yesterday. “After witnessing the dangerous drug cartels and heinous human trafficking cases, I am more convinced than ever that this is the right thing to do for the safety and security of our country.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3105b4d8d9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| In _[Bloomberg](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d3141e59e8&e=3ee4985eea)_ , Katia Dmitrieva reports that U.S. economic growth beat expectations as business investment picked up and GDP rose to 2.6 percent last quarter. “The report shows how Republican-backed tax cuts may have continued to aid growth and help bring the full-year figure to 3.1 percent, just above President Donald Trump’s 3 percent goal.”
---
|
---
| In [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5e50275287&e=3ee4985eea), James Jay Carafano writes that President Trump sent a message that matters by ending the North Korea summit. “The ongoing pressure campaign is what actually protects us and our allies from the threat of North Korea’s nuclear weapons. To relax the pressure before Kim gives up his nukes would put Americans at risk. Thankfully, the president stuck to his negotiating objectives . . . Trump is not Obama. He won’t cut a deal just so he can say he cut a deal.”
---
|
---
| “The White House on Wednesday praised airlines in Vietnam for signing agreements to purchase more than $20 billion in U.S.-built planes and technology. President Trump and Vietnamese President Nguyen Phu Trong attended a signing ceremony that involved trade deals between a number of airline companies based in the two countries,” Zachary Halaschak reports in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9524136900&e=3ee4985eea)_. These agreements reflect the deep economic partnership between the United States and Vietnam today.
---
|

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: A president who doesn’t go around begging millionaires and billionaires for money
body:
The American people deserve a president who doesn’t go around the country begging millionaires and billionaires for campaign donations.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=635%2E150750%2EhHfei8)

Sisters and Brothers -
The American people deserve a president who doesn’t go around the country begging millionaires and billionaires for campaign donations.
Because as reckless as some of these Wall Street, pharmaceutical, and fossil fuel executives are, they are not stupid. They know what they are doing. And the untold amounts of money they will put into this election are a down payment to protect their profits and their immoral, corrupt business practices.
You may have already seen stories about super PACs gearing up, pharma executives hosting fundraisers, and megadonors picking their preferred candidates.
That’s not us. It will never be us. That is not how this campaign is going to be funded.
There is only one way we are going to fund this campaign — and that is with the help of people like you. That’s it. Mostly from emails like this. That’s how we will raise the money it will take to win. But it also means from time to time we have to ask. And today is one of those days.
**[Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign today as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of the billionaire class in this country buying our candidates and elections?](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8916?refcode=em190228-1-120-full&t=50&akid=635%2E150750%2EhHfei8)****
We are aiming to receive more than 400,000 individual donations before the end of this month. It’ll be tough, but meeting tough challenges and goals is what the spirit of this campaign is all about.
As you go, we go. So thank you for chipping in.
All our best,
Team Bernie

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8916?refcode=em190228-1-120-full&t=51&akid=635%2E150750%2EhHfei8)**

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to, [unsubscribe using this link](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=52&akid=635%2E150750%2EhHfei8). But we hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=53&refcode2=635_150750_hHfei8&akid=635%2E150750%2EhHfei8).

GREG PENCE VICTORY is a joint fundraising committee composed of GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, MUSTANG PAC, GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE, and the NRCC.
Any contribution to GREG PENCE VICTORY permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended, from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable contribution limits will be allocated among the participating committees as follows:
a. The first $5,400 from an individual shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the Primary and General Election. The second $5,000 from an individual shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $5,000 shall go to the GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $33,900 shall go to the NRCC.
b. The first $10,800 of a joint contribution shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the Primary and General Election. The second $10,000 of a joint contribution shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $10,000 shall go to GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to$67,800 shall go to the NRCC.
c. The first $5,400 from a federal non-multicandidate committee shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the Primary and General Election. The second $5,000 from a federal non-multicandidate committee shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $5,000 shall go to the GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $33,900 shall go to the NRCC.
d. The first $10,000 from a federal multicandidate committee shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the Primary and General Election. The second $5,000 shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $5,000 shall go to the GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $15,000 shall go to the NRCC.
The contributor’s signature designates his or her contribution as described above. Contributions that exceed a contributor’s contribution limit to a participating committee shall be reallocated to the remaining participating committees according to this allocation formula and as permitted by law.
The legal maximum that an individual and non-multicandidate political action committee may contribute to GREG PENCE VICTORY in a calendar year is $49,300 subject to the increase for inflation in odd-numbered years. The legal maximum amount couples may contribute is $98,600 if each spouse so designates the contributions, subject to the increase for inflation in odd-numbered years. The legal maximum that a multicandidate political action committee may contribute to GREG PENCE VICTORY is $35,000 in a calendar year. Notwithstanding the allocation formula described above, contributions may be designated by the contributor for a specific committee, to the extent permitted by law.
The maximum an individual may contribute to a federal candidate is $2,800 per election subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years; $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee; and $33,900 per calendar year to a national party committee subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years. Qualified multicandidate PACs may contribute $5,000 per election to a federal candidate, $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee, and $15,000 per calendar year to a national party committee. Non-multicandidate PACs may contribute $2,700 per election to a federal candidate, $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee and $33,900 per calendar year to a national party committee, subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years. All funds received in response to this solicitation will be subject to federal contribution limits and prohibitions. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without “green cards,” and federal government contractors are prohibited.
Contributions to GREG PENCE VICTORY, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.

The first $10,000 from a federal multicandidate committee shall be allocated to GREG PENCE FOR CONGRESS, to the maximum allowed for the Primary and General Election. The second $5,000 shall be allocated to MUSTANG PAC. The next $5,000 shall go to the GREAT AMERICA COMMITTEE. Any remaining funds up to $15,000 shall go to the NRCC. The contributor’s signature designates his or her contribution as described above. Contributions that exceed a contributor’s contribution limit to a participating committee shall be reallocated to the remaining participating committees according to this allocation formula and as permitted by law. The legal maximum that an individual and non-multicandidate political action committee may contribute to GREG PENCE VICTORY in a calendar year is $49,300 subject to the increase for inflation in odd-numbered years. The legal maximum amount couples may contribute is $98,600 if each spouse so designates the contributions, subject to the increase for inflation in odd-numbered years. The legal maximum that a multicandidate political action committee may contribute to GREG PENCE VICTORY is $35,000 in a calendar year. Notwithstanding the allocation formula described above, contributions may be designated by the contributor for a specific committee, to the extent permitted by law. The maximum an individual may contribute to a federal candidate is $2,800 per election subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years; $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee; and $33,900 per calendar year to a national party committee subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years. Qualified multicandidate PACs may contribute $5,000 per election to a federal candidate, $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee, and $15,000 per calendar year to a national party committee. Non-multicandidate PACs may contribute $2,700 per election to a federal candidate, $5,000 per calendar year to a federal political action committee and $33,900 per calendar year to a national party committee, subject to an increase for inflation during odd-numbered years. All funds received in response to this solicitation will be subject to federal contribution limits and prohibitions. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without “green cards,” and federal government contractors are prohibited. Contributions to GREG PENCE VICTORY, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year.
